title: Operating Reviews in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger operating reviews in practice judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Operating Reviews in Practice is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Operating Reviews in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good operating reviews in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Operating Reviews in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
